topics.topic: European Parliament approves updated EU directive to combat child sexual abuse crimes
topics.last_summary: The European Parliament agreed on modernizing the EU legal framework against child sexual abuse, criminalizing new technological offenses including AI-generated abuse material, extending prosecution limitation periods, and enhancing victim support.

topics.topic: UN Secretary
topics.last_summary: At the UN High-Level Meeting on HIV/AIDS, leaders warned that progress against HIV is slowing due to financial pressures and shrinking support. Renewed action is urged to expand prevention, treatment, protect human rights, and increase financing to end AIDS as a public health threat by 2030.

topics.last_summary: UN agencies reported that confirmed Ebola cases have surpassed 1,000 in eastern DRC, with nearly three million children and adolescents at risk. topics.topic: UN highlights risks of AI gender bias and calls for inclusive AI governance
topics.last_summary: UN Women warned that AI technologies are reproducing gender stereotypes and amplifying online abuse, with studies showing significant gender and racial bias in AI systems. The organization urged governments, companies, and developers to embed gender equality in AI design, deployment, and governance

topics.topic: UN human rights office warns of worsening humanitarian crisis in Myanmar amid aid decline
topics.last_summary: The UN human rights office reported that reductions in humanitarian aid are exacerbating suffering in Myanmar after five years of conflict-related violence. The report highlights ongoing military attacks, human rights violations, and the impact of aid cuts on civilian protection efforts.

topics.topic: UN officials highlight progress and ongoing needs in Syria amid calls for recovery support
topics.last_summary: UN officials reported signs of progress in Syria after over a decade of crisis but emphasized that humanitarian needs remain acute. They called for sustained humanitarian action, political will, and investment to support recovery, safe returns, and sustainable livelihoods.
